cards.headline: Abu Trica Pleads Not Guilty In US Court
cards.subline: Trial set for September 8 over an alleged $8m romance scam targeting elderly Americans.

cards.headline: Argentina And England Meet In World Cup Semis
cards.subline: Bellingham struck twice against Norway; Álvarez sank Switzerland in extra time.

cards.headline: Typhoon Bavi Slams China After 1.7 Million Flee
cards.subline: The storm hit Taizhou at about 144 km/h — China's second typhoon in a week.

cards.headline: Two-Day National Cleanup Ends Across Seven Regions
cards.subline: Mahama pledges follow-up collection of all garbage heaped by the roadsides.
